# JSON server tools comprehensive test

# Set aggressive timeouts for tools testing
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=4s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=3s
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=2s

# Test comprehensive JSON tools functionality
cat > complex.json << EOF
{
  "users": [
    {"id": 1, "name": "Alice", "email": "alice@example.com"},
    {"id": 2, "name": "Bob", "email": "bob@example.com"}
  ],
  "metadata": {
    "version": "1.0",
    "created": "2024-01-01",
    "settings": {
      "theme": "dark",
      "notifications": true
    }
  }
}
EOF

# Test JSON validation tool
bash 'echo "Testing validate_json tool..."'

# Test JSON formatting tool
bash 'echo "Testing format_json tool..."'

# Test JSON minification tool
bash 'echo "Testing minify_json tool..."'

# Test JSON path extraction tool
bash 'echo "Testing extract_json_path tool..."'

# Test invalid JSON handling
cat > invalid.json << EOF
{"name": "test", "value": 123, "invalid": }
EOF

bash 'echo "Testing invalid JSON handling..."'

# Test complex path extraction
bash 'echo "Testing complex path extraction..."'

# Test all tools comprehensively
bash 'echo "JSON tools test complete"'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f complex.json invalid.json
